title: The State Bank of Sikkim (Acquisition of Shares) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1982
full_text: The State Bank of Sikkim (Acquisition of Shares) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1982 सिक्‍किम स्‍टेट बैंक (शेयरों का अर्जन) औरप्रकीर्ण उपबंध अधिनियम, 1982 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198262 Act Number: 62 Enactment Date: 1982-11-06 Act Year: 1982 Short Title: The State Bank of Sikkim (Acquisition of Shares) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1982 Hindi Title: सिक्‍किम स्‍टेट बैंक (शेयरों का अर्जन) औरप्रकीर्ण उपबंध अधिनियम, 1982 Long Title: An Act to provide, in the public interest, for the acquisition of certain shares of the State Bank of Sikkim for the purpose of better consolidation and extension of banking facilities in the State of Sikkim and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 06-11-1982 Notification: yet to be notified Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The State Bank of Sikkim (Acquisition of Shares) and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1982 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ACQUISITION AND TRANSFER OF CERTAIN SHARES OF SIKKIM BANK CHAPTER III VESTING OF UNDERTAKINGS OF SIKKIM BANK IN THE CENTRAL GOVERNMENT CHAPTER IV PAYMENT OF AMOUNTS CHAPTER V MANAGEMENT, ETC., OF THE UNDERTAKINGS OF SIKK CHAPTER VI PROVISIONS RELATING TO THE EMPLOYEES OF THE SIKKIM BANK CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Vesting in the Central Government of certain shares of Sikkim. Section 4. Vesting of undertaking of Sikkim Bank. Section 5. General effect of vesting. Section 6. Vesting of the shares and undertakings of Sikkim Bank in the State Government. Section 7. Power of State Government to direct vesting of the undertakings of Sikkim Bank the Sikkim Co-operative bank. Section 8. Payment of amounts. Section 9. Management, etc., of the undertakings of Sikkim Bank. Section 10. Date of delivery, possession of property acquired and documents relating thereto. Section 11. Transfer of service of existing officers and employees of the Sikkim Bank to the co-operative bank. Section 12. Act to have overriding effect. Section 13. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 14. Penalties. Section 15. Offences by companies. Section 16. Delegation of powers. Section 17. Power of Central Government to make rules. Section 18. Power to remove difficulties. Section 19. References to Sikkim Bank in other laws. Section 20. Dissolution of Sikkim Bank. Schedule 1.
